game_name: Dune II: The Building of a Dynasty

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for this RTS game

special_mechanics.name: Resource-Based Unit Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player units move across terrain based on command-driven pathfinding. Vehicles include harvesters, light attack vehicles (trikes/raiders/quads), and tanks with varying movement characteristics

special_mechanics.name: Terrain Interaction
special_mechanics.description: Units navigate rocky terrain and sand dunes. Sandworm hazard blocks certain paths. Spice blooms create hazardous explosions when triggered by unit contact or gunfire

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Types
special_mechanics.description: Different houses control different unit types with implied speed/armor tradeoffs: Atreides Sonic Tank, Harkonnen Devastator (heavy armor), Ordos Deviator (nerve gas). House Ordos faster raider trikes vs Harkonnen quad vehicles

tier_notes: Tier 2: RTS game with no documented character movement physics. Sources contain speedrun leaderboards and general gameplay overview. No precise movement parameters, gravity, or jump mechanics exist for this strategy game—player input is macro-level unit commands rather than frame-by-frame character physics.
